arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has been banned for two games after being sent off at the end of the Merseyside derby.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Newcastle – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Premier League leaders Liverpool entertain Newcastle United at Anfield tonight. It was a significant weekend for the Reds as their quest to win the league title was given an almighty boost. Arsenal’s failure to overcome West Ham and Liverpool’s subsequent victory over Manchester City extended their lead to 11 points at the top of the […] The post Liverpool vs Newcastle – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: What Mo Salah has done for Liverpool is truly remarkable - this is how he can kill Newcastle
arts.sum: They have lost only four of 42 games across four competitions this season and three can be explained away _ PSV Eindhoven in the Champions League was a dead rubber after winning eight successive ties, Plymouth away in the FA Cup saw them field a reserve side, and Spurs away in the first leg of the Carabao Cup was by a single goal margin with Anfield to come to secure Wembley which they did with a 4-0 slaughter turning the whole thing into an easy aggregate win. In my utter bewilderment after having witnessed a seven-goal hour and a half of sheer bedlam at St James Park I echo what I said 48 hours ago: which Newcastle United will turn up next?

arts.ttl: Arne Slot doubles down on Darwin Nunez criticism
arts.sum: The effort level of Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez have been questioned on more than one occasion in recent weeks.
